channel.title: Indeed NL - marketing automation jobs in Nederland
channel.description: Latest marketing automation jobs in Nederland

item.title: Marketing Automation Specialist - Atlas Group
item.description:
We are looking for a Marketing Automation Specialist to join our team in Amsterdam. You will manage HubSpot workflows, build email campaigns, and analyse funnel performance.

Requirements: 3+ years experience with marketing automation platforms, strong analytical skills.

item.title: CRM & Email Marketing Manager - Nexora Solutions
item.description: Lead our CRM strategy and own end-to-end email marketing programmes. Work closely with sales and product teams to drive engagement and revenue.

item.title: HubSpot Campaign Manager - Bright Commerce BV
item.description: Join our growth team as a HubSpot Campaign Manager. You will design and execute inbound marketing campaigns, manage lead nurturing sequences, and report on KPIs.

item.title: Digital Marketing Strategist - Orbis Media
item.description: Drive digital growth across paid, organic, and lifecycle channels. 5+ years in digital marketing required. Based in Rotterdam.

item.title: Growth Marketing Lead - No Company Name Format
item.description: Exciting growth opportunity with a fast-growing scale-up. Own paid acquisition, SEO, and conversion rate optimisation.
